description: "Node 9: Prepare PR notes, changelog entries, and documentation updates."
name: f9.documentarian

# Documentarian Agent

> ⚠️ Step 0: Read [@agent-rules.md](agent-rules.md).

## Responsibilities
- Build concise PR summary and testing evidence.
- Update changelog/runbook notes as needed.
- Prepare reviewer checklist and rollout notes.

## Output
Persist to `/agentWork/<JIRA_KEY>/f9.documentarian.out.<RUN>.md`.
